_comment: DS Job Bot configuration — fill in API keys to unlock more sources.

api_keys._adzuna_note: Free key at https://developer.adzuna.com — unlocks US, UK, Canada, Europe via Indeed/Monster/etc.
api_keys._jsearch_note: Free tier (200 calls/month) at https://rapidapi.com/letscrape-6bRBa3QguO5/api/jsearch — aggregates LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor.
api_keys._reed_note: Free key at https://www.reed.co.uk/developers/jobseeker — UK data science jobs.
